summary: Frontend testing completed for iteration 10 features: Abstract background added to homepage/services/Over Mij pages, Webflow replaced with Onderhoud & Hosting in navigation/footer/Diensten page, All 12 FAQs visible and clickable, services section spacing reduced. All 9 features verified successfully.

2. Services section has abstract background with white overlay ✓
3. Diensten page shows only Webdesign and Onderhoud & Hosting (no Webflow) ✓
4. Navigation dropdown shows 'Onderhoud & Hosting' instead of Webflow ✓
5. Footer shows 'Onderhoud & Hosting' under Diensten section ✓
6. All 12 FAQs are visible on homepage (data-testid faq-button-0 through faq-button-11) ✓
7. FAQ items expand when clicked showing answers ✓
8. Onderhoud & Hosting service page shows price €25/maand ✓
9. Services section has reduced top padding (py-16 lg:py-20) ✓
10. Over Mij page has abstract background image ✓
11. Onderhoud page has abstract background visible ✓
12. Webflow text does not appear anywhere on the site ✓
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx correctly uses BG_IMAGE constant for abstract background in hero, services section
Navigation dienstenLinks array correctly shows Onderhoud & Hosting instead of Webflow
FAQSection shows all 12 FAQs without truncation using grid layout
ServicesSection padding reduced from py-24 lg:py-32 to py-16 lg:py-20
DienstenPage services object only contains webdesign and onderhoud (no webflow)
Footer correctly lists Onderhoud & Hosting under Diensten
OverMijPage correctly uses BG_IMAGE for abstract background
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified. Webflow Development completely removed and replaced with Onderhoud & Hosting (€25/maand). Abstract background image applied consistently across homepage hero, services section, Over Mij page, Onderhoud page, and Diensten page. All 12 FAQs displayed in 2-column grid without 'View all' button. Services section spacing reduced.
